name: Patten School Bus Svc Inc
principals: A B Rock (related entity - Rock Transportation)
districts_or_customers: Private schools in Jacksonville/Northeast FL area
recent_news: Patten School Bus Co (founded 1972) appears closely linked to/operates under Rock Transportation (founded 1992, AB Rock); the listed website Rock-Transportation.Com points to Rock Transportation which serves 70+ private schools, St. Johns Middle School Athletic Assoc, and Nassau County School District with a 22-30+ bus fleet. Patten's founder James Patten has 40+ years experience; small standalone Patten entity (6 employees, ~$276K rev) suggests legacy/wind-down or shared back office with Rock.
website: pattentransportation.weebly.com (Rock-Transportation.com appears to be operating entity)
fit_notes: Long-tenured (1972) founder-led private school charter operator in Summit FL footprint; high succession signal given founder age and small scale. Likely best evaluated jointly with Rock Transportation (sister/successor entity) which has the actual fleet (22-30+ buses) and Nassau County district contract — that combined book could be a real tuck-in in Northeast FL.

name: J & M Vera School Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: No M&A or material news identified. Active FL entity since Jan 2001; remains family-run by Vera family. USDOT registered (FMCSA SAFER profile).
fit_notes: Tiny independent Miami-Dade MDCPS-certified family operator (Vera family) in Summit's FL footprint. Likely too small to be a standalone tuck-in but could be an add-on alongside a larger Miami-area acquisition; succession risk is moderate as second-gen Vera family is already involved.

name: LED Inc
recent_news: LED Transportation Inc is a limo/luxury bus/black car operator in Canton OH owned by Gregg Elliott (veteran). Offers disability transportation alongside party buses, executive cars, motor coaches. No school district contracts identified.
fit_notes: NOT A FIT — LED Transportation is a limo/charter/luxury bus operator with ancillary disability transport, not a school-bus or contracted student-transportation operator. Should be removed from Summit tuck-in pipeline.

name: Verida Inc
owner_or_parent: Verida (formerly Southeastrans); reported to be PE/sponsor-backed NEMT broker — independent of school-bus PE platforms
districts_or_customers: State Medicaid programs in GA, AR, IN, LA, TN, DC
recent_news: Verida is the rebrand (Sept 2021) of Southeastrans, a 20+ year NEMT broker founded by Steve Adams. Administers transport for 3M+ covered lives. Won expanded GA Medicaid contract for all 5 regions effective Apr 2026. Minority-owned. Received NEMT compliance patent. Not a school-bus or student-transport operator.
fit_notes: NOT A FIT — Verida is a Medicaid NEMT BROKER/management company (formerly Southeastrans), not a school-bus operator. It contracts to 900+ transportation providers but owns no school-bus fleet. Wrong category for Summit tuck-in; remove from pipeline.

name: Art (ART Transportation)
service_types: medical/special-needs transportation (per Yelp listing as Medical Transportation)
possible fine-art logistics per ZoomInfo — conflicting
districts_or_customers: Aventura/Miami-Dade area; no school district contracts identified
recent_news: Conflicting public listings: Yelp categorizes ART Transportation (20533 Biscayne Blvd, Aventura) under 'Medical Transportation' while ZoomInfo describes it as fine-art shipping/installation for museums/galleries. Source data classifies the company as special-needs (special_needs=1, school=0). Very small (4 employees, ~$262K rev). Website artransportation.net is content-thin.
fit_notes: LIKELY NOT A FIT — Insufficient public evidence this is a school-bus or contracted student-transport operator; appears to be either a NEMT/medical transport micro-operator or a fine-art shipper. Recommend dropping unless direct phone diligence confirms SPED/student contracts.
